faqs.question: Are there any specializations offered by Amor Design Institute?
faqs.answer: Amor Design Institute is a good institution for UG Diploma courses, and these programs are delivered by highly experienced faculty. Major specialization at Amor Design Institute are Fashion Design, Jewellery Design.

faqs.question: Which courses does Amor Design Institute offer?
faqs.answer: Amor Design Institute provides programmes including UG Diploma in streams such as Design, and are excellent for students to build their careers. The institute has specializations in Fashion Design, Jewellery Design.

reviews_list.batch_info: Diploma in Interior Design - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Learning, creating, and growing - My interior design experience at Amor.

review_content.Learning Experience: Learning at Amor Design Institute has been an immersive and empowering journey. The design studios, constant critiques, and real-life project simulations created a space where creativity thrives. We are encouraged to express unique ideas, yet guided to make them practical and technically sound. Weekly design reviews, hands-on workshops, and engaging faculty members made every session impactful.
review_content.Placements: Amor Design Institute offers impressive placement support that genuinely helps students transition from education to employment. From early on in the course, we are guided on building a strong portfolio, preparing resumes, and presenting our work professionally. The faculty members and placement team work closely with students to align them with internships and job opportunities that match their skills and interests.

faqs.question: How are the placements at UIET CSJMU Kanpur?
faqs.answer: Placements at UIET CSJMU Kanpur is good. As per the NIRF report 2025, 190 students were placed and 51 students went for higher studies out of 302 students during the BTech placement drive 2024. The median package recorded was 3.25 LPA.

faqs.question: What is the average package offered during UIET CSJMU Kanpur placements?
faqs.answer: UIET CSJMU Kanpur average package data is not released. BTech median package recorded in 2024 was 3.25 LPA.

University Institute of Engineering and Technology, CSJMU offers several UG, PG, Doctoral and Diploma level courses in the stream of engineering and computer applications. The popular programmes at UIET Kanpur include BTech and MCA, among others. The courses are offered across multiple specialisations in full-time mode.
Candidates can check the University Institute of Engineering and Technology popular programmes, along with the eligibility, and fees in the table below:

Students are expected to reach out to companies themselves
Strong alumni network that help with placement opportunities
Very Active and resourceful, college is also involved
Loved in first year but not in later years

fees_and_eligibility.overview: University Institute of Engineering and Technology, CSJM University offers numerous programmes at the UG, PG, Doctoral and diploma levels in the stream of engineering and computer applications. At the UG level, students can choose from courses, namely B.E. / B.Tech and BCA. On the other hand, at the PG level, the University Institute of Engineering and Technology, CSJM University offers MCA and PG Diploma. Admission to the courses is on the basis of merit and entrance scores. The courses at UIET Kanpur are offered across multiple specialisations. The duration of the courses at UIET CSJMU ranges between years.

faqs.answer: A:    The total tuition fees for University Institute of Engineering and Technology, CSJMU MCA is INR 1.4 lakh. Aspirants need to pay the course fees to confirm their seat in the institute. The total fees includes tuition fee, caution deposit, exam fees, etc.
faqs.question: How much is the fees for MCA at University Institute of Engineering and Technology, CSJMU?

faqs.answer: A:    Candidates must have passed a relevant UG degree programme from a recognised universiy with Mathematics at Class 12 level to apply for MCA at University Institute of Engineering and Technology, CSJMU. Aspirants must have documents proving their eligibility for verification at the time of admission.

reviews_list.review_title: Overall, the college is too good in everything.

review_content.Placements: Mostly, students get placed, but packages are not so good. This year, placements have increased. Some seniors got selected with a package of 10 LPA. Our branch placements are excellent. Everyone got placed this year. The CS placements are average. If students want to join this college, then it is a good choice for them.
review_content.Infrastructure: The hostel is too good in everything. The food is also good. Sports ground and rooms are good. It provides food four times. The electricity is also provided full-time. There is a good garden in the hostel. We can eat many things at the hostel. Overall, the hostel life is good.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Chemical Engineering - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: Placements are not good, the infrastructure is really good, and faculty is great.

review_content.Placements: The placements are not very good. Around 70 percent of students get placed. The highest package is 12 LPA, and the average package is around 3–4 LPA. However, the university placement cell is working on improving the situation. In the coming years, placements are expected to get better.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is great. The university atmosphere is very pleasant. 5G Wi-Fi is available. Classrooms could be better, but labs are well-maintained. Overall, the university campus is very large, with many places to explore. The hostels needs a lot of upgradation.

faqs.answer: University Institute of Engineering and Technology, CSJM University offers admission on the basis of both, merit and entrance scores. However, the institute has specified a minimum aggregate of 40% in Class 12 from any recognised national or state board. Candidates with 85% typically have a decent chance at getting admission to the institute.
faqs.question: Q: Can I get into University Institute of Engineering and Technology, CSJM University with 85%?

faqs.answer: University Institute of Engineering and Technology, CSJMU is a constituent of the CSJM University. UIET is not approved by University Grants Commission. However, University Institute of Engineering and Technology is approved by the All India Council for Technical Education (AICTE).
faqs.question: Q: Is University Institute of Engineering and Technology, CSJMU UGC approved?

faqs.answer: University Institute of Engineering and Technology, CSJM University offers courses at UG, PG and doctoral levels. The institute offers BTech and BCA programmes at UG and MCA and PG Diploma at the PG levels. Admission to UIET courses is merit or entrance-based. Candidates can apply online for the preferred course.

faqs.answer: University Institute of Engineering and Technology, CSJM University tuition fee costs around INR 1.3 L - INR 4.6 L. This fee is exclusive of other components including Application Fee, Examination Fee, Security Deposit, Hostel Fee, etc. The fee is taken from the official website of the institute. It is subject to change. Candidates must go to the official website before applying to UIET, CSJM University.

review_summary.college_name: UIET CSJMU Kanpur Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: If you are coming here for B.Tech for any reason, come and work hard.

content.Placements: Placements aren't great. However, with the help of our placement cell, placements are improving. The college is approaching reputable companies. Efforts are being made to ensure good placements. This isn't solely the college's fault. Students should also have some responsibility. If students make zero effort, placements won't happen.
content.Infrastructure: There are good facilities in my department. All the lab equipment is there. The library is very good. There is Wi-Fi facility in the entire library. The classrooms are also good. In the summer, there are a lot of problems in the classes of our department due to a lack of AC. Overall good. The hostel is also very good. The hostel people are strict. There are a lot of restrictions there. These restrictions have been imposed for the good of the children. Overall, the hostel is good. The food in the mess is average. The breakfast is fine.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Good academic environment with scope for improvement in placements.

content.Placements: About 60 percent of students got placed through campus recruitment in the recent placement cycle. 12.5 LPA (approximately) is the highest package. The average package is about 3 to 3.5 LPA and the lowest package is between 1 LPA and 2 LPA. Top recruiting companies are TCS (Tata Consultancy Services), Infosys, HCL Technologies, and Samsung Electronics. 50 to 60 percent of students got internships in companies like HCL, Infosys, TCS, etc. Top roles offered are Software Developer Engineer, Trainee Engineer, Technical Support, Management Trainee, and Business Associate.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Overall, the college is too good in everything.

content.Placements: Mostly, students get placed, but packages are not so good. This year, placements have increased. Some seniors got selected with a package of 10 LPA. Our branch placements are excellent. Everyone got placed this year. The CS placements are average. If students want to join this college, then it is a good choice for them.
content.Infrastructure: The hostel is too good in everything. The food is also good. Sports ground and rooms are good. It provides food four times. The electricity is also provided full-time. There is a good garden in the hostel. We can eat many things at the hostel. Overall, the hostel life is good.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Chemical Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Placements are not good, the infrastructure is really good, and faculty is great.

content.Placements: The placements are not very good. Around 70 percent of students get placed. The highest package is 12 LPA, and the average package is around 3–4 LPA. However, the university placement cell is working on improving the situation. In the coming years, placements are expected to get better.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is great. The university atmosphere is very pleasant. 5G Wi-Fi is available. Classrooms could be better, but labs are well-maintained. Overall, the university campus is very large, with many places to explore. The hostels needs a lot of upgradation.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Chemical Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: CSJMU Kanpur University, Kanpur.

content.Placements: The highest package is 4 LPA this year, and companies like JK Cement or Nerolac are the companies that come for hiring from the chemical department. But I feel that in the upcoming years, placement will get better as the university is also getting better and has good infrastructure.
content.Infrastructure: The hostel is good, rooms are spacious enough, food quality is also good, Wi-Fi is provided free, but the speed is slightly less, labs and classrooms are getting upgraded, although now also they are modern and way better than others, use smartboard, and the library is also good.

admission_process.title: University Institute of Engineering and Technology, CSJM University Admission Process 2026

paragraphs: University Institute of Engineering and Technology, CSJM University admission processis conducted online. Candidates must apply for a course to participate in the selection rounds. Check below the steps to get a seat in the institute:
Candidates can apply online for a course at UIET. Aspirants need to fill out the application form on the institute's website.

The institute offers admission to its flagship BTech course based on JEE Main rank of the candidates. The seats left vacant afer last round of counselling for BTech are filled by the process of direct admission based on Class 12 scores of the candidates. The selection for MCA is based on entrance test conducted by CSJMU. For all other courses, admissions are merit-based.

Candidates need to participate in CSJMU Counselling for a seat in the BTech programme. Aspirants need to report at the campus for document verification. Selected candidates must pay theUniversity Institute of Engineering and Technology, CSJM University feesto confirm admission at the college.

reviews.review_heading: If you are coming here for B.Tech for any reason, come and work hard.
reviews.review_text: There are good facilities in my department. All the lab equipment is there. The library is very good. There is Wi-Fi facility in the entire library. The classrooms are also good. In the summer, there are a lot of problems in the classes of our department due to a lack of AC. Overall good. The hostel is also very good. The hostel people are strict. There are a lot of restrictions there. These restrictions have been imposed for the good of the children. Overall, the hostel is good. The food in the...

reviews.review_heading: Good academic environment with scope for improvement in placements.
reviews.review_text: All the facilities are good enough.  There is a library, gym, swimming pool, track, helipad, canteen, etc., on the campus. The quality of food is below average, but it depends on the students. There is a sports tournament held every semester. There are medical facilities where anyone can get a check-up at a very low cost.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, the college is too good in everything.
reviews.review_text: The hostel is too good in everything. The food is also good. Sports ground and rooms are good. It provides food four times. The electricity is also provided full-time. There is a good garden in the hostel. We can eat many things at the hostel. Overall, the hostel life is good.

reviews.review_heading: Placements are not good, the infrastructure is really good, and faculty is great.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is great. The university atmosphere is very pleasant. 5G Wi-Fi is available. Classrooms could be better, but labs are well-maintained. Overall, the university campus is very large, with many places to explore. The hostels needs a lot of upgradation.

reviews.review_heading: CSJMU Kanpur University, Kanpur.
reviews.review_text: The hostel is good, rooms are spacious enough, food quality is also good, Wi-Fi is provided free, but the speed is slightly less, labs and classrooms are getting upgraded, although now also they are modern and way better than others, use smartboard, and the library is also good.

reviews.review_heading: Review of University Institute of Engineering and Technology, CSJM University.
reviews.review_text: The course structure was pretty good if you wanted to learn more programming or had an interest in computers. For research purposes, it was also good as you got a chance to explore what was happening in the technical world, and you also got a chance to make your own website or do many research projects you wanted to explore. Hostels were very well organized and well maintained by the authority. The toilets were very hygienic, the rooms were very spacious, and students were provided with a bed, a...

reviews.review_heading: My review about this college.
reviews.review_text: The college understands that a perfect balance needs to be maintained between the skills required in the areas of system and software development to the enterprise level. The programme gives the students the right platform in the areas of software design and engineering information, education, accessibility, architecture, and project management. Separate hostel for girls and boys. Rooms are single as well as sharing. They provide all the facilities for a student including Wi-Fi. Quality of food ...

reviews.review_heading: Its great to take admission in this college, make sure to consider this for core engineering branch.
reviews.review_text: The whole campus is equipped with Wi-Fi. The library has books. Our faculty at CSJMU is top-notch. They help us to get better in all aspects of learning and facing the filled day after day. I am able to generate a great interest in learning new skills, and this is because of our professor.

reviews.review_heading: Till now, this college is satisfactory.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are decent, with Wi-Fi and a smart board. Hostels are decent, there are double-sharing rooms (well spacious) and a mess which provides you with food, and there are playgrounds for playing and keeping you guys physically fit. The mess food is decent.

reviews.review_heading: Review of University Institute of Engineering and Technology, CSJM University.
reviews.review_text: This course is good for making our future in the software and IT field. In this course, you will learn about computer languages like C, Java, Python, HTML, PHP, and other subjects like software engineering and accounts management. It focuses on the development of teachers' subject matter knowledge, knowledge of students, and subject specialization. The hostel is good. There are about 4 hostels: 2 for girls and 2 for boys. The hostel environment is also good. The fee for the boys' hostel is about...

reviews.review_heading: My review about this college.
reviews.review_text: Hostel rooms were great however you had to share your room with one room partner but you will got hostel rooms easily in 1st year. But 2nd year onwards seats were few but you will find Kanpur city very economical, if you were looking for a PG. The meal quality was also good and changed every day.

reviews.review_heading: My review of this college.
reviews.review_text: Hostel facilities are good as there are proper facilities and a good atmosphere. There are 2 sharing as well as separate rooms at affordable prices. The mess food is good and hygienic.

reviews.review_heading: Students who prefer a good campus life with a low JEE rank can consider this college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is quite good in the college. You can compare it with IITs, NITs, and many good private colleges. Labs are also quite good, and the campus is fully Wi-Fi-connected. The library is also quite good. In the case of hostels, you can compare them with any private college. They are decent or even too good. Both AC and non-AC categories are available. Laundry facilities are also provided by the college starting this year. The canteen is also quite good. Overall, facilities are at a d...

reviews.review_heading: Decent university with good faculty, satisfactory placements, and a peaceful campus life.
reviews.review_text: CSJMU has a fairly good infrastructure for academics as well as hostels. Wi-Fi is available across the campus and the labs are decently equipped. Classrooms are spacious with projectors in some departments and the library is well-stocked with academic and reference books. Hostel facilities are satisfactory with proper security, clean rooms, and a good maintenance team. The mess provides decent food, although variety can be improved. There are good medical facilities, a gym, sports grounds, and i...

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college if you have a low percentile and coming for higher studies.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is decent, and you can expect good facilities. There are only two hostels for boys and four for girls. The cleanliness is good, and the food is also satisfactory. The mess staff are well-behaved, and the quality is okay sometimes good, sometimes bad. A canteen is also available.

reviews_list.review_title: I'm dissatisfied with the faculty and facilities of our college.

review_content.Placements: In our college placements, 5 students got placed in our course. Tata consultancy services, and Capgemini were the top companies that came to our college for recruitment. The highest salary package that was offered is 5lLPA, the lowest package is 2LPA and the average package is 3LPA. In our college, nearly 50% Of students got internships. Students will get placed with off-campus opportunities during their last year
review_content.Infrastructure: Our campus was not equipped with a Wi-Fi connection. The classrooms, library, and labs were good. The food available in the canteen was good, but it was expensive. The college is not very nice to choose from. The hostel and the college are both located somewhere in different locations, and the college is not provided with good facilities.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Aeronautical Engineering - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: I am not satisfied with the placements and there is no proper education system.

review_content.Placements: There are no placements, lecturers, faculty, and labs. There is no proper facility and college management attracts you by saying free college fees and that they will provide scholarships but they will never help once you get the admission. Many students are stuck with this.
review_content.Infrastructure: There is no hostel for the engineering students and no proper food. They charge Rs.70,000 for the hostel but there is no food, proper rooms, Wi-Fi, labs, and proper classrooms. A good library is available.
review_content.Faculty: Teachers are a bit helpful and qualified and their teaching quality is not at all good. The pass percentage is 50%. Some of the teachers who have completed their Ph.D. are countable. They act to be too strict but not proper.

overview_faqs.question: Is Karavali Group of Colleges a good college/Institute?
overview_faqs.answer: Karavali Group of Colleges is a reputed institute for B.Sc., UG Diploma, MBA/PGDM, M.E./M.Tech, B.Ed, B.P.Ed, B.A.M.S., B.Tech, BHM, Pharm.D, B.Pharma, M.Pharma. Students can opt these programs to pursue their career in Design, Hospitality & Travel, Business & Management Studies, Engineering, Teaching & Education, Science, Medicine & Health Sciences. Institute has trained & experienced faculty who deliver these programs. Karavali Group of Colleges has a review rating of 2.4 on the basis of reviews by students. In addition to this, it has been rated 2.5 on campuslife, 2.2 on placements, 2.7 on faculty and 1.9 on Infrastructure.

review_summary.college_name: Karavali Group of Colleges Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely dissatisfied because of faculty, bad placements in 2023.

content.Placements: In our college, there were 70 students in our graduating class. Of those, one of my friends got a 4.7 LPA package and went on to work as a software engineer at LG Soft. Others went to startups and some went to foreign countries to pursue higher education.
content.Infrastructure: There is no Wi-Fi in the classrooms but it is available in the labs. The quality of the labs is good and the college canteen is the best thing about the college. We had a lot of fun there. A little more improvement is needed.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: I am not satisfied due to lack of faculty and not proper classes are held.

content.Placements: Some students got placed in IT industry with the lowest salary package. Wipro, Infosys etc. are the companies visit for placement. Around 99% of students completed internships at different companies like Airobosoft Pvt limited, Zyfer Manglore and many. Designing and software development are the roles offered.
content.Infrastructure: We have good infrastructure for labs, classrooms, and library. Some are staying in government hostels and some are in college hostel. Food is not bad at hostel and good medical facilities. In government hostel food is not so expected but still getting every facility provided by government.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: I'm dissatisfied with the faculty and facilities of our college.

content.Placements: In our college placements, 5 students got placed in our course. Tata consultancy services, and Capgemini were the top companies that came to our college for recruitment. The highest salary package that was offered is 5lLPA, the lowest package is 2LPA and the average package is 3LPA. In our college, nearly 50% Of students got internships. Students will get placed with off-campus opportunities during their last year
content.Infrastructure: Our campus was not equipped with a Wi-Fi connection. The classrooms, library, and labs were good. The food available in the canteen was good, but it was expensive. The college is not very nice to choose from. The hostel and the college are both located somewhere in different locations, and the college is not provided with good facilities.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Aeronautical Engineering - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: I am not satisfied with the placements and there is no proper education system.

content.Placements: There are no placements, lecturers, faculty, and labs. There is no proper facility and college management attracts you by saying free college fees and that they will provide scholarships but they will never help once you get the admission. Many students are stuck with this.
content.Infrastructure: There is no hostel for the engineering students and no proper food. They charge Rs.70,000 for the hostel but there is no food, proper rooms, Wi-Fi, labs, and proper classrooms. A good library is available.
content.Faculty: Teachers are a bit helpful and qualified and their teaching quality is not at all good. The pass percentage is 50%. Some of the teachers who have completed their Ph.D. are countable. They act to be too strict but not proper.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied with this college because of its good faculty members.

content.Placements: Some companies visit the campus selection to select the eligible students from the computer science and electronics, and communications branches. In this college, only software companies visited in the previous year. Due to the COVID-19, there were no campus placements in the college.
content.Infrastructure: The college has a hospital on the campus. It provides all facilities. The canteen is available, and it serves a variety of food. Sports are conducted by the university yearly.
content.Faculty: In the electronics and communication department, all faculty members are highly qualified. They do not show an attitude to the students. They are friendly, and they explain concepts easily to understand students. Semester exams are not difficult to pass because we study in internal exams. Our branch has 8 faculty members. They are awesome, and we can easily understand the syllabus.

Library is available. Hostel facility is available but is in different location. You need to travel for about 30 minutes to reach college from hostel. Bus fees will be separate. Campus does not have an auditorium. Campus is tiny and does not have much space.
Food is average.

reviews.review_heading: It's better not to select this college.
reviews.review_text: Labs are okay, but not too good they are just manageable. There is no Wi-Fi facility, and the library facilities are poor. The infrastructure is not good, and the quality of administration is also poor. There is no encouragement for sports and games. The hostel is the worst. There are no good facilities for the hostel, and the security is bad.

reviews.review_heading: Don't waste your time joining this college.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi facility is not available. Labs are not good and there is no proper equipment. The college is situated in the centre of an area which is like a forest. A first-year student has died in a small pond near the hostel. Wardens are not good, and the food provided is average, but the prices are too high. There is no proper ground available for sports, only a small basketball ground is available.

reviews.review_heading: Dissatisfied because of the infrastructure and placements.
reviews.review_text: The college doesn't provide Wi-Fi, one Practical Lab for stitching, Classrooms are not spacious, and all other facilities like library medical facilities sports and games are available libraries are of full of books and. Classrooms should be more spacious so the students will be comfortable in class and they will be more focus on Class.

reviews.review_heading: Not very good college but it is okay. The college officials teach well and it is good.
reviews.review_text: Good infrastructure, good classes and good lab. There is good fashion designing lab, there are more sewing machines, and we have sketching tables and all other facilities. The college has cultural and heritage functions. The college doesn't have Wi-Fi or fast internet. I did not have any infrastructural related issues.

reviews.review_heading: Really I am very satisfied. It is the best college in Mangaluru and stands in the top 5.
reviews.review_text: The classrooms and the library are really good. The Wi-Fi facilities are not provided. The ground is not available for playing, but there is a basketball court in the college. We conduct sports meet once in a year which is more entertaining. It happens in Mangaluru famous ground Mangala Stadium. The hostels are good.

Good college with good memories. Teachers are helpful,and till now memory with friends in mind. All teachers helped to improve in life and many teachers supported a lot in many difficult situations and the college friends. They will be as good friends always in mind. Good college with good memories. Teachers are helpful,and till now memory with friends in mind. All teachers helped to improve in life and many teachers supported a lot in many difficult situations and the college friends. They will be as good friends always in mind.

In my opinion it is too good college for one who really deserves the best education. You will have to face any sort of problem in life if you are here. But you really enjoy the college life. reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Commerce (B.Com.) - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: The life of MMMC Patiala, excellent college life.

review_content.Placements: I'm still in the first year, so I honestly don't know, but what I do know is what they told us in the orientation. Many companies like Amazon and others come to the college for interviews, and the highest per annum salary last year was 9 Lacs. Many paid internships also arose through the interview process.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college campus is cozy and welcoming. A lot of courses, aside from B.Com, are available. Free Wi-Fi is available in the library, computer labs, science department labs, etc., and they are also well updated. However, there are no hostel services in the college, but a number of PGs are available in the surrounding colonies. The college canteen's pasta is a must-try; I absolutely love it and can't go a day without eating it.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Commerce (B.Com. Hons) - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: A mix of both learning and fun.

review_content.Placements: Around 60-70% of students are placed, with the minimum package being offered at 13k. Top recruiting companies include Mahindra. Approximately 40-50% of BCom graduates help in understanding the corporate world much better, as it opens up doors to understanding how a company works and how to manage their accounts.
review_content.Infrastructure: Classrooms are well maintained, with WiFi facilities and a focused environment for studies, along with a lot of extracurricular activities. The campus is well cleaned, and there are many new things that the staff encourages us to engage with, participate in various events, and guide us at every moment.

review_summary.college_name: Multani Mal Modi College, Patiala Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Commerce (B.Com.) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Overall the best college.

content.Placements: At Multani Mal Modi College Patiala, there are not so good placements for their students. Their minimum package of placement is 2 LPA. Placements are only for students of B.Com, BBA, and BCA. 40% of students are shortlisted for placements.
content.Infrastructure: Overall, the infrastructure of the college is too good but in Multani Mal Modi College Patiala, there is no hostel facility but their PG is available near the college for students. The infrastructure of the college is very nice especially the commerce block of the college.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Commerce (B.Com.) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: An honest review of my college.

content.Placements: Multani Mal Modi College, Patiala, is an average college according to me because only 50% students got placement from this college. The average package students got is 1 LPA. College offers various courses like B.Com, M.Com, etc. Private companies recruit students, roles offered are bank manager and finance manager.
content.Infrastructure: Classrooms are not well painted, the furniture is good, and all facilities like computer lab, science lab, and maths lab are there in the college. The canteen is below average, the food sometimes tastes bad, and there is not any playground to practice games. Only a tennis court is in the college.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Commerce (B.Com.) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: The life of MMMC Patiala, excellent college life.

content.Placements: I'm still in the first year, so I honestly don't know, but what I do know is what they told us in the orientation. Many companies like Amazon and others come to the college for interviews, and the highest per annum salary last year was 9 Lacs. Many paid internships also arose through the interview process.
content.Infrastructure: The college campus is cozy and welcoming. A lot of courses, aside from B.Com, are available. Free Wi-Fi is available in the library, computer labs, science department labs, etc., and they are also well updated. However, there are no hostel services in the college, but a number of PGs are available in the surrounding colonies. The college canteen's pasta is a must-try; I absolutely love it and can't go a day without eating it.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Commerce (B.Com. Hons) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: A mix of both learning and fun.

content.Placements: Around 60-70% of students are placed, with the minimum package being offered at 13k. Top recruiting companies include Mahindra. Approximately 40-50% of BCom graduates help in understanding the corporate world much better, as it opens up doors to understanding how a company works and how to manage their accounts.
content.Infrastructure: Classrooms are well maintained, with WiFi facilities and a focused environment for studies, along with a lot of extracurricular activities. The campus is well cleaned, and there are many new things that the staff encourages us to engage with, participate in various events, and guide us at every moment.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Commerce (B.Com. Hons) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: There is a good placement in college with best teachers and environment and etc

content.Placements: I am currently pursuing B.com hons now I am in 3rd year as I experienced that everything which is necessary for a good course in a institute is available in my college. The rate of placement is moderate but the annual CTC is very low as you say 2-3 lacks annually.
content.Infrastructure: All the classrooms are fully furnished and a huge library with a treasure of knowledge is available. Wifi is available all over campus with good speed but there no hostel in college but there are many PGs at low rate with luxury accommodation also. Healthy food and facilities are there.

admission_overview.college_name: Multani Mal Modi College, Patiala Admission 2025: Fees, Courses, Eligibility and Selection

admission_process.title: Multani Mal Modi College, Patiala Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Multani Mal Modi College, Patiala admissions are based on merit. The institute considers applications of candidates meeting the eligibility criteria.Multani Mal Modi College, Patialaoffers courses at UG, PG and Certificate levels. Some of the courses include B.A., B.Sc., PG Diploma and M.A. Candidates can apply online for the preferred course.
The total tuition fees for UG courses isINR 45,250 - 96,750. Aspirants may also need to pay one-time caution deposit at the time of admission.
The institute offers UG courses for 3 years. PG courses are offered for 1 year - 3 years.

reviews.review_heading: Overall the best college.
reviews.review_text: Overall, the infrastructure of the college is too good but in Multani Mal Modi College Patiala, there is no hostel facility but their PG is available near the college for students. The infrastructure of the college is very nice especially the commerce block of the college.

reviews.review_heading: An honest review of my college.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are not well painted, the furniture is good, and all facilities like computer lab, science lab, and maths lab are there in the college. The canteen is below average, the food sometimes tastes bad, and there is not any playground to practice games. Only a tennis court is in the college.

reviews.review_heading: The life of MMMC Patiala, excellent college life.
reviews.review_text: The college campus is cozy and welcoming. A lot of courses, aside from B.Com, are available. Free Wi-Fi is available in the library, computer labs, science department labs, etc., and they are also well updated. However, there are no hostel services in the college, but a number of PGs are available in the surrounding colonies. The college canteen's pasta is a must-try; I absolutely love it and can't go a day without eating it.

reviews.review_heading: A mix of both learning and fun.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are well maintained, with WiFi facilities and a focused environment for studies, along with a lot of extracurricular activities. The campus is well cleaned, and there are many new things that the staff encourages us to engage with, participate in various events, and guide us at every moment.

reviews.review_heading: There is a good placement in college with best teachers and environment and etc
reviews.review_text: All the classrooms are fully furnished and a huge library with a treasure of knowledge is available. Wifi is available all over campus with good speed but there no hostel in college but there are many PGs at low rate with luxury accommodation also. Healthy food and facilities are there.

reviews.review_heading: Selecting the appropriate college in student life.
reviews.review_text: All the staff and sitting area coupled with canteen moreover a park which is located on the back side of the college which gives it not only the eye catchy look but tremendously it is very appealing to eyes in the winter time and at that time students take the advantage of bright sun.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Multani Mal Modi College, Patiala.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is not available throughout the campus. The library is available. Our labs are good. Classrooms are good for the commerce department. The library is good.

reviews.review_heading: I am not satisfied with our college infrastructure, environment, and culture.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is not good. There is only one Wi-Fi in the entire college, and due to our college's high strength, its speed is very low. Classrooms and labs are good. Our college canteen is not good in condition.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is average for students.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good in our college. The canteen facility is average. Wi-Fi speed is slow. The library is also good, and all types of books are available. Sports and games are not available in our college.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is good in terms of education.
reviews.review_text: Our college has many labs. Our classrooms are spacious, and students can study properly. Our library is good.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely dissatisfied with the type of education and facilities provided.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is also very bad. The canteen always smells. Overall, it's a complete wastage of money and time. In labs, there is always a shortage of apparatus. Students have to wait for another group to complete and then their turn comes.

reviews.review_heading: I'm satisfied with the college.
reviews.review_text: We had online projectors in classes. They are very neat and clean rooms. There's free Wi-Fi in every department. The library was quite non-complex. The canteen was much cleaner than other colleges, and the food quality was far fresher than other colleges in comparison. The labs were providing great strength too.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is better than other colleges in Paitala.
reviews.review_text: College has all the facilities like Wi-Fi, labs, clean classrooms, and a library. We can also purchase food from the canteen both packed and local food like parantha and samosa. They also organise games and have NCC, NSS, BSG, and a red cross. The parks for sitting in free lectures.

reviews.review_heading: I am absolutely satisfied because of the faculty members.
reviews.review_text: The library is good here, but the classrooms are not very good. There are no Wi-Fi facilities. The quality of food served here is average, and the infrastructure of the canteen is also average.

reviews.review_heading: I am extremely dissatisfied with this college. It does not provide placements.
reviews.review_text: Computer lab and chemistry lab are available here. The Wi-Fi facility is poor. The library does not have books. If the library has some books, then they can only be issued by toppers. The food served in the canteen is good. Medical facilities are not available for students. There is no place for sports and games in the college.  Even sometimes there is no water on the premises.

paragraphs: Wisdom College for Creativity and Design admission 2025 (enquiry form)is currently open. The college offers courses, such as BVoc, BDes, Advance Diploma courses among others. The college is affiliated withMangalayatan UniversityandSikkim Professional University. To get admitted to Wisdom College for Creativity and Design, candidates must meet the eligibility criteria set by the college. The college offers more than 25 courses in the stream of Design, Data Analytics, Data Science, etc. The application process atWCCDis conducted online. Read the following article to know more aboutWisdom College for Creativity and Design course admission2025.

Wisdom College for Creativity and Design offers admission to candidates who fulfil both eligibility and selection requirements. Aspirants have to apply online for the preferred course. Below are the steps to get a seat in WCCD:
STEP 1: JDIFT Application Process 2025

Aspirants can apply on the institute website. Candidates need to register with an application fee of INR 1,200. Candidates have to fill out the application form, upload documents and pay a registration fee to complete the application process.
STEP 2: Selection
The institute selects candidates based on their merit in the last qualifying exam.
STEP 3: Admission Confirmation
Once the selection is over, aspirants are informed about their admission. Shortlisted aspirants need to payWCCD feeto confirm their seat in the institute.

individual_reviews.course: Graphics, Web Design and Development - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: Our college provides a good and better career.

content.Placements: About 80% of the students from our course got placed. The salary offered here ranges from Rs. 20,000 to 25,000 per month. The information regarding the top recruiting companies of our course is not disclosed. The top role offered in our course is web development. The salary package offered in our course is 2.5 LPA. About 70% of the students got internships in local shops, and some students got in Vistaprint, Red Chillies Star, News Jabong, Zapak and other local companies. Local shops like Dharma Productions are available to practice and do internships.

content.Placements: 1.100% placement assistance provided to students. 2. The highest salary was 45000, average 25000 and the lowest was 10000. 3. Graphic vista prints, reach local Mumbai insult Services, H vintage Technologies, Quest global technology are the top recruiting companies. 4. Flash animator Layout Designer Digital artist 5. 5.4 Lacs was the highest package, 3 Lacs was average and 1.2 Lacs was the lowest. 6.100% Internship offered to students.
content.Infrastructure: 1. Wi-Fi available. 2. Both 2D and 3D labs and Classrooms are available. 3. Hostels are at walking distance from our centre. 4. We also have Canteen with good snacks. 5. We have good medical facilities. 6. We have workshops, events weeks and seminars conducted every month.

individual_reviews.title: It's an institute that drives you towards your dreams.

individual_reviews.course: VFX Prime - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: VFX is in trend and have ample job opportunities.

content.Placements: Minimum 75% of students are placed in my course with a salary of minimum 20000 as assistance. 75% of students got an internship from my course in National or Multinational companies. They give us the platform to explore and compete in all over India.
content.Infrastructure: There are well-furnished labs and classrooms but they do not provide us Wi-Fi. Here the facility of hostel, as well as canteen, is not provided, no medical facilities. Sports and games are there but the college needs to improve its infrastructure.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc. in Information Technology - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: Good faculty support and decent placement with scope for more industry exposure.

review_content.Placements: Around 65 -70% of students from the B.Sc IT course got placed through the campus recruitment drives. Highest package 5.2 LPA, lowest package 2.2 LPA, average package 3.0-3.5 LPA. Top recruiting companies are TCS, Wipro, Infosys, Tech Mahindra, HCL, etc. About 40-50% of students secured internships during the course. Internships were offered by companies, Persistent Systems, TCS ION, startups in Nagpur & Pune, IT hubs, and Local software and web development firms. Top roles offered are Software developers/ Trainees, Web developers, Data entry, MS executive, and IT helpdesk Executive.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Computer Application (BCA) - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Satisfied because of 2025 placement.

review_content.Placements: In my batch, more than 30 students got placed. They help with placement by superset and have cooperative placement officer team. I am currently a student at Sadabai Raisoni Women's College, Nagpur, and my experience here has been quite positive.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is decent, with well-maintained classrooms, a library, computer labs, and seminar halls. Wi-Fi is available in most areas of the campus. College also focuses on extracurricular activities, workshops, and seminars which help students grow in various dimensions.

reviews_list.batch_info: M.Sc. in Computer Science - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: My honest review of college.

review_content.Placements: Placements are very good. I got placed in 3 companies Wipro, Concentrix, and ICICI Prudential. Companies like TCS, Wipro, Infosys, Teach Mahindra, Amazon, Concentrix, ICICI, Atos Syntel, and E-Clinical come for placements. The field has many job and placement opportunities. The college placement cell manages the recruitment process on the campus.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college girl stated that it used to have a hostel in the college premises, but now that hostel building has been transformed into an administrative block, for now. There are no facilities like a hostel. But there is a college canteen inside the college premises. Books are available in the library, no need to purchase, can issue books from the library through the Library ID-card.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Computer Application (BCA) - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: It has affordable courses with helpful teachers and practical learning.

review_content.Placements: 60 to 70 percent students from my BCA batch got placed. The highest package offered is 6 LPA and the lowest package is 2.5 LPA. The average package is 3.5 LPA. Companies like TCS, Wipro, Infosy and Capgemini visited the campus for placements. Internships are also offered by startups and mid size IT firms especially in roles like web development, data analysis and technical support. The top roles offered are software developer, data analyst, and support engineer.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college infrastructure is quite good. We have well-equipped computer labs with high-speed internet, smart classrooms, and a decent library with relevant books and journals. Wi-Fi is available throughout the campus. The hostel facilities are average, with clean rooms and basic amenities. The quality of food in the mess is satisfactory, though it can be improved. The campus has a medical room. It also encourages sports with a separate playground and indoor game areas.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc in Food Nutrition and Dietetics - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Review of Sadabai Raisoni Women's College, Nagpur

review_content.Placements: A decent amount of companies come however I am not sure since I am currently studying. We have our internship in 6th semester which is provided by college. All 45 students are sent to different hospital for a 45 days internship, they don't give stipend which is little bummer. My hospital is Arneja Heart And Multispeciality Hospital, Nagpur Maharashtra.
review_content.Infrastructure: Campus is brand new only two years since its inauguration and it's nice and spacious. Our college has two floors in the building 7 and 8 floors. We have countless classes, three computer labs, one chemistry lab, and one kitchen. Classrooms are spacious, well-ventilated, and clean all the time.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Computer Application (BCA) - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: It's good to get admission if you want to get placed, otherwise it's ok.

review_content.Placements: Data analyst, developer, associate engineer, and various other job roles are offered as per our skills and capabilities to get placed. There are tech and nontech job roles offered by the company. One can get different scopes of knowledge. It’s good to get placed.
review_content.Infrastructure: Canteen and sports room are available, but campus is quite small. There is no ground or a place where we can spend our free time. The building of the college is of 12 floors. Hostel facility is not available by our college, but they suggest a girls' hostel as well as PG.

review_summary.college_name: Sadabai Raisoni Women's College, Nagpur Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Information Technology - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Good faculty support and decent placement with scope for more industry exposure.

content.Placements: Around 65 -70% of students from the B.Sc IT course got placed through the campus recruitment drives. Highest package 5.2 LPA, lowest package 2.2 LPA, average package 3.0-3.5 LPA. Top recruiting companies are TCS, Wipro, Infosys, Tech Mahindra, HCL, etc. About 40-50% of students secured internships during the course. Internships were offered by companies, Persistent Systems, TCS ION, startups in Nagpur & Pune, IT hubs, and Local software and web development firms. Top roles offered are Software developers/ Trainees, Web developers, Data entry, MS executive, and IT helpdesk Executive.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Application (BCA) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Satisfied because of 2025 placement.

content.Placements: In my batch, more than 30 students got placed. They help with placement by superset and have cooperative placement officer team. I am currently a student at Sadabai Raisoni Women's College, Nagpur, and my experience here has been quite positive.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is decent, with well-maintained classrooms, a library, computer labs, and seminar halls. Wi-Fi is available in most areas of the campus. College also focuses on extracurricular activities, workshops, and seminars which help students grow in various dimensions.

individual_reviews.course: M.Sc. in Computer Science - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: My honest review of college.

content.Placements: Placements are very good. I got placed in 3 companies Wipro, Concentrix, and ICICI Prudential. Companies like TCS, Wipro, Infosys, Teach Mahindra, Amazon, Concentrix, ICICI, Atos Syntel, and E-Clinical come for placements. The field has many job and placement opportunities. The college placement cell manages the recruitment process on the campus.
content.Infrastructure: The college girl stated that it used to have a hostel in the college premises, but now that hostel building has been transformed into an administrative block, for now. There are no facilities like a hostel. But there is a college canteen inside the college premises. Books are available in the library, no need to purchase, can issue books from the library through the Library ID-card.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Application (BCA) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: It has affordable courses with helpful teachers and practical learning.

content.Placements: 60 to 70 percent students from my BCA batch got placed. The highest package offered is 6 LPA and the lowest package is 2.5 LPA. The average package is 3.5 LPA. Companies like TCS, Wipro, Infosy and Capgemini visited the campus for placements. Internships are also offered by startups and mid size IT firms especially in roles like web development, data analysis and technical support. The top roles offered are software developer, data analyst, and support engineer.
content.Infrastructure: The college infrastructure is quite good. We have well-equipped computer labs with high-speed internet, smart classrooms, and a decent library with relevant books and journals. Wi-Fi is available throughout the campus. The hostel facilities are average, with clean rooms and basic amenities. The quality of food in the mess is satisfactory, though it can be improved. The campus has a medical room. It also encourages sports with a separate playground and indoor game areas.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc in Food Nutrition and Dietetics - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Review of Sadabai Raisoni Women's College, Nagpur

content.Placements: A decent amount of companies come however I am not sure since I am currently studying. We have our internship in 6th semester which is provided by college. All 45 students are sent to different hospital for a 45 days internship, they don't give stipend which is little bummer. My hospital is Arneja Heart And Multispeciality Hospital, Nagpur Maharashtra.
content.Infrastructure: Campus is brand new only two years since its inauguration and it's nice and spacious. Our college has two floors in the building 7 and 8 floors. We have countless classes, three computer labs, one chemistry lab, and one kitchen. Classrooms are spacious, well-ventilated, and clean all the time.

reviews.review_heading: Good faculty support and decent placement with scope for more industry exposure.
reviews.review_text: Spacious and well-ventilated classrooms. Dedicated computer lab with good internet connectivity. Campus Wi-Fi is available for students. Well-stocked library for students, other facilities, food canteens, Medical facilities, sports and games facilities, cleanliness & maintenance.

College also focuses on extracurricular activities, workshops, and seminars which help students grow in various dimensions.

reviews.review_heading: My honest review of college.
reviews.review_text: The college girl stated that it used to have a hostel in the college premises, but now that hostel building has been transformed into an administrative block, for now. There are no facilities like a hostel. But there is a college canteen inside the college premises.  Books are available in the library, no need to purchase, can issue books from the library through the Library ID-card.

reviews.review_heading: It has affordable courses with helpful teachers and practical learning.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is quite good. We have well-equipped computer labs with high-speed internet, smart classrooms, and a decent library with relevant books and journals. Wi-Fi is available throughout the campus. The hostel facilities are average, with clean rooms and basic amenities. The quality of food in the mess is satisfactory, though it can be improved. The campus has a medical room. It also encourages sports with a separate playground and indoor game areas.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Sadabai Raisoni Women's College, Nagpur
reviews.review_text: Campus is brand new only two years since its inauguration and it's nice and spacious. Our college has two floors in the building 7 and 8 floors. We have countless classes, three computer labs, one chemistry lab, and one kitchen. Classrooms are spacious, well-ventilated, and clean all the time.

reviews.review_heading: It's good to get admission if you want to get placed, otherwise it's ok.
reviews.review_text: Canteen and sports room are available, but campus is quite small. There is no ground or a place where we can spend our free time. The building of the college is of 12 floors. Hostel facility is not available by our college, but they suggest a girls' hostel as well as PG.

reviews.review_heading: The faculty is good, helpful, understandable and encourages students.
reviews.review_text: The labs and classrooms are very defined, as I was not a hostel student but one of my friends said the hostel facility is also good. The seminar room and the conference room are very modified. It is a luxury classroom to study in. The benches are also comfortable.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely dissatisfied because of the infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: There is no facility provided by the college. The college infrastructure is pathetic, and there is only one building. That building is used for multiple purposes. The 1st floor has some offices, and the 2nd and 3rd floors have classrooms. The top floor has some other offices which is not a part of our college.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Sadabai Raisoni Women's College.
reviews.review_text: Labs are great and clean. In the previous year, the lab was renovated. The canteen serves many different dishes. Classrooms are quite good, and there is a ducting facility in some rooms. There is no medical room, but the faculty take quick action if anything happens. Our college has only one lift, and classrooms are on the 3rd floor.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college with the best teachers, average placements, good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: Our college provided us with good facilities. Classrooms were good enough, and the infrastructure was also good and comfortable. There was a big library, and all required books and newspapers were available here. There is a huge computer lab at our college. Only a canteen facility was provided.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has good faculty, and they try to place students in good companies.
reviews.review_text: BPO companies visit our college and select our course students. Some companies recruited students by test, which is good in my view. The main part of our course is on-demand in the IT sector. Our batch students got placed in different companies. Almost 90% of the students from our course got selected.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with faculty, good infrastructure, and placements are good from the last few years.
reviews.review_text: Good air-conditioned lab with mentors is provided. There is a Huge library with all required books and a reading club in college. Classrooms are well developed with all facilities like light, fan, desk, bench, board, etc. Fast Wi-Fi facility is available in our college.

reviews.review_heading: This college is very popular for conducting events.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college was good. Though we don't have a big campus area for conducting programmes, the classrooms are big and spacious. Labs are good. Food in the canteen was good, and the coffee available there is too good, and all the students go to the canteen to have coffee.

reviews.review_heading: Really good for its studies, teachers, and a good exposure to industry.
reviews.review_text: We have each seperate cell for classes, library, Computers, sports etc. Each cell is well maintained and upto the mark. Canteen is very good and the food is very hygienic. Infrastructure is nice. College life is really good in Sadabai raisoni women's college.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with the college. Teachers are helpful. The method of teaching is good.
reviews.review_text: The cooking lab and the chemistry lab are good with all facilities. The library also contains all books related to our subject. The library provides a good atmosphere for studying. There is a sports room for indoor games like carrom and table tennis. The college also conducts sports competitions. The canteen is also good with good, and hygienic food. It has great surroundings.

college_info.college_name: National School of Skills Foundation

highlights.summary: What's new at the National School of Skills Foundation Pune? Admissions are open for various courses for 2023-2024.

placements.overview:
National School of Skills Foundation is a renowned private institute located in Pune, Maharashtra. The institute offers Certificate, Degree and Diploma courses in full-time mode, with a focus on streams such as Animation, Design, Hospitality and Travel. Students can choose from diverse After 10th, PG and UG programs. The institute has a maximum intake of 680 students. It provides education at an affordable fee at an approximate of INR 29,500-237,000. The faculty is trained and experienced and provides students with expert guidance. The institute also has a well-supported campus with modern facilities.

Q. Which courses are offered by the National School of Skills Foundation Pune?

Q. Does the National School of Skills Foundation Pune offer scholarships to students?

reviews_list.batch_info: Diploma in Interior Design - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: NSS Foundation gives the best to its students.

review_content.Placements: Excellent placements are provided by our college. Students can also get multiple offers. Special care is taken for each student to get jobs and internships. There are 15 to 20 students in my batch, out of which 90% have been offered internships at good firms, and the rest have started their own businesses.
review_content.Infrastructure: We have spacious and comfortable classrooms with LED TVs and air-conditioners. We have labs for fashion construction and interior construction. Computer labs are available for students of VFX, animation, interior designing and fashions. Special classrooms are provided for guest lectures.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Voc in Interior Design - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: The teaching faculty members are good.

review_content.Placements: I got my admission in 2022, in a batch of 22 students, as I remember. We are still completing our academics, so I won’t be able to answer many questions in this questionnaire. My seniors informed me about the internships they completed and the opportunities the college offered them, they are pleased with the types of companies and job roles they received. I’ll be graduating soon, so I will update this here accordingly.
review_content.Infrastructure: Clean classrooms, good computer labs, and, of course, we had a great time working on our laptops with Wi-Fi. The spaces are designed in a very simple yet strategic manner to keep students focused on their work ( I noticed this as soon as I learned color psychology in my first year).

highlights.summary: Get all the latest information regarding Davinci Media College Courses, Fees, Eligibility, Admission, Rankings and Reviews on this page.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Davinci Media College offers a wide range of programmes to students at the UG and PG levels. The college is mainly concerned with streams such as Design, Mass Communication & Media and Animation. At the UG level, the college offers courses such as B.Sc. and UG Diploma. At the PG level, the college offers courses such as M.Sc. Davinci Media College courses are offered to students in Full Time and Part Time mode.

faqs.answer: A:    Freshers in this industry can earn upto INR 2-4 LPA whereas experienced profesionals are offered INR 7-10 LPA. Individuals' earnings after completing a BSc in Animation curriculum are determined by a range of criteria. Animation students with less than a year of experience earn roughly INR 20,000 per month on average. Candidates with some experience can earn up to Rs. 50,000 per month. A five-year-experienced animator can expect to earn roughly INR 80,000 per month.
faqs.question: What are salaries after BSc Animation?

college_info.college_name: Davinci Media College Courses: Degree, Diploma, Certificate 2026

faqs.answer: Like internships, placement also varies from college to college. Some popular animation colleges provide 100 per cent placements. Candidates are advised to check the placement record before applying for admission.in order to become an animator, one must have the necessary creative flair. faqs.question: Q: Can I get a placement after completing a BSc in Animation?

faqs.answer: Freshers in this industry can earn upto INR 2-4 LPA whereas experienced profesionals are offered INR 7-10 LPA. Individuals' earnings after completing a BSc in Animation curriculum are determined by a range of criteria. Animation students with less than a year of experience earn roughly INR 20,000 per month on average. Candidates with some experience can earn up to Rs. 50,000 per month. A five-year-experienced animator can expect to earn roughly INR 80,000 per month.

college_info.college_name: The American College (Satellite Campus): Courses, Fees, Admission 2025, Reviews, Info

highlights.summary:
The TANCET 2026 application form is live until Apr 10, 2026, for The American College (Satellite Campus) admission to the MBA course. Also, the TANCET exam 2026 is scheduled for May 9, 2026.

A few more updates are given below:

placements.overview: The American College (Satellite Campus) is an institute. The American College (Satellite Campus) offers a total of 15 courses at UG and PG levels in 5 specialisations such as Biotechnology, Computer Science, English, Mathematics and Physics. Furthermore, it offer courses such as MBA/PGDM, B.Sc., M.Sc., BCA, B.Com, B.A. and BBA in Full Time mode. The American College (Satellite Campus) fee structure includes a total tuition fee ranging from INR 81,615 and 3,71,510. It offers courses, in streams such as Science, IT & Software, Business & Management Studies, Accounting & Commerce, Design and Humanities & Social Sciences. The institute has a safe and well-equipped campus with all the advanced facilities.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Com. in Computer Application - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: The American College of Madurai passed out student feedback and reviews.

review_content.Placements: A 12th grade pass with a high percentage (at least 70%) is required to be placed in a course. HCL, ZOHO, and other IT companies and banks are recruiting. Accounting and HR roles are offered for your course. The highest package offered is up to INR 350000 per annum, and the lowest package is INR 120000 per annum. Up to 75% of students are eligible for internship placements in IT companies and the banking sector.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college infrastructure was really good and clean. The college infrastructure is fully green. On campus, there is a free 5G-speed wi-fi connection. Lab facilities are also maintained properly, and advanced labs are available. Classrooms are also good and clean. Every classroom has a smart board available. The library has a plethora of books that make it simple to prepare for group exams. Hostel facilities: good spread, bad spread, and clean toilets maintainedFoods refer to a four-day vegetarian menu and a three-day non-vegetarian menu. Sports and games are also available at your college, which is important for games and sports.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Com. in Computer Application - Batch of 2020
reviews_list.review_title: I am satisfied with college but it would be better if they provide placements.

review_content.Placements: There are no placements. College offers a quality education system.
review_content.Infrastructure: College has a good atmosphere and environment. College prefers more sports activities, conduct games, and athletics. There is a canteen facility. One of the biggest libraries. Good infrastructure. There are labs for Chemistry, Physics, and separate computer labs for UG and PG.
review_content.Faculty: Teachers are very friendly and highly qualified. Their teaching quality is the best. Semester exams are moderate if you study well you can pass.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Computer Application (BCA) - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: The best and most joyful college in Madurai.

review_content.Placements: Many students get placed in my course. The college offers salaries from Rs.35,000 to Rs.40,000. Top recruiting companies are TCS, Accenture, and Google. Many students also get internships through our course. Some of these companies are NOVItech. The role offered is software developer.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our department offers state-of-the-art facilities to support both learning and research. Classrooms are equipped with smart boards, projectors, and high-speed Wi-Fi connectivity. Specialized laboratories provide hands-on experience with the latest equipment and software for relevant courses.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Computer Application (BCA) - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: "Comprehensive College Review Highlights Strengths and Areas for Improvement" .

review_content.Placements: Above average students got internship from the course and in our course you can learn about basics of c, c+, Java and python. The Bachelor of Computer Applications BCA is an undergraduate programme focused on computer Science and information technology. It covers topics such as programming, database management, networking, and software development. BCA equips students with practical skills and theoretical knowledge, preparing them for careers in IT, software engineering, and web development.
review_content.Infrastructure: The food in mess and canteen are so good and the infrastructure are also so good labs and classrooms are so clean. Canteens provide the best snacks. The computers in the lab are checked every month for better functioning. A colleges infrastructure plays a crucial role in enhancing the learning experience. Modern facilities include well-equipped classrooms, state-of-the-art laboratories, libraries with extensive resources, and technology-enabled space. Additional, well-maintained hostels, sports complexes, and recreational areas create a conducive environment for both academic and extracurricular development.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Com. in Computer Application - Batch of 2013
reviews_list.review_title: Lack of proper education. No permanent faculty present.

review_content.Placements: I don't remember any recruitment happened in our college. All students were worried about it. All students were regretting of getting into this college. But luckily all my batchmates are in good position now. Because of some strike in our college no companies came for recruitment.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure was okay. Our college area is spread over 44 acres. They are labs for all departments but 60% of them are closed. No sports, no cultural programmes.
review_content.Faculty: Faculty always kept on changing in our college. Only one or two faculty were good in teaching. All others were just dependent on the books. We expected good teaching faculty who can teach us practically apart from text book. Expected some special lectures from any outside. But nothing happened like that.

BCA equips students with practical skills and theoretical knowledge, preparing them for careers in IT, software engineering, and web development.
content.Infrastructure: The food in mess and canteen are so good and the infrastructure are also so good labs and classrooms are so clean. Canteens provide the best snacks. The computers in the lab are checked every month for better functioning. A colleges infrastructure plays a crucial role in enhancing the learning experience. Modern facilities include well-equipped classrooms, state-of-the-art laboratories, libraries with extensive resources, and technology-enabled space. Additional, well-maintained hostels, sports complexes, and recreational areas create a conducive environment for both academic and extracurricular development.

individual_reviews.course: B.Com. in Computer Application - Batch of 2013
individual_reviews.title: Lack of proper education. No permanent faculty present.

content.Placements: I don't remember any recruitment happened in our college. All students were worried about it. All students were regretting of getting into this college. But luckily all my batchmates are in good position now. Because of some strike in our college no companies came for recruitment.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure was okay. Our college area is spread over 44 acres. They are labs for all departments but 60% of them are closed. No sports, no cultural programmes.
content.Faculty: Faculty always kept on changing in our college. Only one or two faculty were good in teaching. All others were just dependent on the books. We expected good teaching faculty who can teach us practically apart from text book. Expected some special lectures from any outside. But nothing happened like that.

overview_faqs.question: Is it worth pursuing MBA at Venkateshwara Open University?
overview_faqs.answer: Venkateshwara Open University MBA is a 2 year course, offered with various specialisations. The University offers an MBA in Information Technology, Financial Management, Human Resources Management, Marketing and Project Management. Furthermore, VOU offers UGC recognised courses in full-time mode based on the graduation results in relevant fields. VOU MBA fee structure includes a total tuition fees of INR 76 K.To conclude, MBA is one of the popular courses of VOU and based on the provided stats, it is worth pursuing.

overview_faqs.question: Is Venkateshwara Open University good for MBA?
overview_faqs.answer: Yes, Venkateshwara Open University can be considered as good for MBA. As it provides specializations in many fields and the specialisation subjects are planned to produce skilled experts to address the employment necessities of MBA graduates, have certain potentials that help them differentiate from the mass and for industrial sectors. The university provides skill assessment facility where it approaches students’ skills to prepare them for the industry. It also provides job and placement assistances to its students after the completion of the course.

overview_faqs.question: What is the fee for various courses at Venkateshwara Open University?
overview_faqs.answer: Venkateshwara Open University, NAAC A+ accredited is a UGC approved university providing quality education with lucrative placements. You can refer below for various courses offered by the university alongwith its fee structure. VOC offers:Master Of Business Administration (MBA) at INR 76,000.Bachelor of Arts (BA) at INR 30,000.Bachelor of Design (B.Des)- Interior Design at INR 60,000.Bachelor of Commerce (B.Com) at INR 30,000.Bachelor of Computer Appliances (BCA) at INR 75,000.Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) + Master of Business Administration (MBA) at INR 1,00,000.These were some commonly recommend courses by students. There are many more courses offered by VOC, you can refer to its official site for more details.

overview_faqs.question: What are people's opinions on VOC for MBA?
overview_faqs.answer: Vankateshwara Open University is a reputed and recommended platform for various distance learning aspirants. As it is UGC approved university it is said to be a good choice for an online MBA by various experts. Though there are differences in opinions some experts do not recommend VOC at all for MBA. Some students have experienced delays in the admission and certification process. On the other hand, there are enough good responses that can convince one to go for VOC as option for their MBA.The overall reviews are good and recommends the platform for distant MBA course.

paragraphs: Venkateshwara Open University offers courses on the UG, PG, Diploma, Doctoral, PG Diploma, and Certificate level. Each course level contains several courses which are offered in many specialisations including Management, Education, Sciences, Computer & Information Sciences, Vocational Education, etc.
The Venkateshwara Open University admissions are decided on merit basis, requiring the students to fulfill the eligibility criteria mentioned in the table below:
Venkateshwara Open University application process can be completed in both online and offline mode. The steps mentioned below show the entire Venkateshwara Open University application process:
Applying for admissions

To apply for Venkateshwara Open University students must visit the official website and register themselves on it. Once completed, students get access to the application forms which they need to fill out and attach all necessary documents to, before submission.
Confirmation of Admissions

If the application of the candidate is shortlisted, they will be asked to pay the Venkateshwara Open University admission fees. Once the fee is paid, the admission of the students is considered confirmed.
