faqs.question: Are admissions at Venkateshwara Open University entrance-based or merit-based?
faqs.answer: There is no entrance-based or any merit-based admissions at Venkateshwara Open University.Follow the steps below to gain admission to Venkateshwara Open University Distance Education:Candidates must go to the university's official website to apply for their desired course.Submission of the completed application form, along with the required documents (attested copies of mark sheets and certificates, as well as a Demand Draft for the prescribed fees).Following registration, the candidate will receive a confirmation letter, student ID, and study materials via courier within 15-20 days.

faqs.question: Can I join Venkateshwara Open University after Class 12?
faqs.answer: Venkateshwara Open University offers admission based on merit. The University offers UG, PG, PG Diploma and Certificate level courses in full-time mode. Admission to various UG level courses is provided based on the Class 12 results. Candidates must secure a minimum aggregate in Class 12 or any previous equivalent examination.

Venkateswara Open University (VOU) located in Arunachal Pradesh is ranked as one of the finest and among the top universities in India. VOU is approved by University Grants Commission (UGC) and offers a wide range of various UG and PG courses. However, VOU is well known for it's MBA programmes offering quality education. placements.overview: Ionic Fashion Academy offers various scholarship options for the students. These scholarships are based on eligibility criteria, system itself suggests the schemes for which a student is eligible.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Ionic Fashion Academy offers diverse programmes at UG and PG levels in Full Time mode. The offered programmes can be chosen from streams such as Design, Science and Beauty & Fitness. At the UG level, candidates have the provision to opt from courses such as B.Sc. and UG Diploma. Whereas, at PG level, Ionic Fashion Academy offers courses such as M.Sc. Ionic Fashion Academy fee structure for all the courses is around INR 90,000 to 3,20,000.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc. in Fashion Design - Batch of 2016
reviews_list.review_title: IFA keeps their promises.

review_content.Placements: Faculty members are highly qualified and experienced. IFA keeps their promises of 100% placement. Faculty members are always encouraging and boosted us all the time. Right now I am working in R. K Fashion, Kolkata. I got this job before my final exam.
review_content.Infrastructure: Classroom are good. They provide study materials also. They provide practical oriented classes. Though I was staying at home but the communication from my home to institute was very convenient as it was just near park street metro station. I came to know from my friend that they provide good quality and hygienic food.

college_info.college_name: The Global Open University

highlights.summary:
The Global Open University (TGOU) is a distance learning university located in Dimapur, Nagaland which was established in 2006. It is a joint public-private partnership venture between the Government of Nagaland and the World Institution Building Programme (WIBP). The University is recognized by UGC, Ministry of Human Resource Development, Government of India, AIU and DEC. It offers UG, PG, Diploma, Advance Diploma programmes in the streams of Management & Commerce, Health & Medical Sciences, Ecology & Environment, Law & Juridical Science, Psychology & Counseling, Education, Journalism & Mass Communication, Computers & Information Technology, Library & Information Science, Applied Science, Social Science and Tourism, Travel & Hospitality Management. Admissions to all the programmes is granted on the basis of merit.

The Global Open University offers distance education degree/diploma programmes at both undergraduate and postgraduate levels in the streams of Management & Commerce, Health & Medical Sciences, Ecology & Environment, Law & Juridical Science, Psychology & Counseling, Education, Journalism & Mass Communication, Computers & Information Technology, Library & Information Science, Applied Science, Social Science and Tourism, Travel & Hospitality Management.

The University also offers Diploma, Advanced Diploma, and Post Graduate Diploma, short-term online certificate courses apart from its distance education degree courses. Below are important details of The Global Open University admission process that an applicant must know of:

The University offers 127 courses across 11 streams. Some of the popular The Global Open University courses are listed below along with their specialisations, eligibility, and fee:

The University has a placement cell which offers placement assistance to the students and enhances their skills in order to shape their careers. The Global Open University placement cell is visited by top recruiters like Taj Group, Vivanta, Raddison, Lemon Tree and Le Meridien.

faqs.answer: A:    No, you cannot become a lawyer without a Law degree. You mandatorily need to obtain degrees such as BA/BCom/BSc/BBA LLB or LLB in order to be a lawyer in India. To become a lawyer, one must first complete three-year or five-year LLB from a recognised university and possess degree certificate. Then, they must enrol themselves in local Bar Council of the concerned state and enrolled as an advocate. Within two years of the enrolment, they must appear and clear AIBE in order to be eligible to practise anywhere in India.

overview_faqs.question: What salary can I expect after completing Disaster Management course?
overview_faqs.answer: The Disaster Management salary expert might vary owing to a variety of factors, one of which is experience. Students can start their careers at a minimum salary of INR 2-3 LPA and can earn up to INR 10-12 LPA with experience. A fresh graduate in disaster management makes INR 5.5 LPA on average. A disaster management professional's salary may differ based on their area of expertise, level of education and experience. The industry a Disaster Management professional works in can also affect their Disaster Management salary.

overview_faqs.question: What is the starting salary of a fashion designer in India?
overview_faqs.answer: For an entry-level, the salary starts from INR 3.92 LPA. After having more than 10 years of experience depending upon your skill you can earn INR 30-35 LPA in India. Fashion Designers have lots of opportunities to work in big companies, foriegn countries, etc. However, it all depends upon the skill you have, how good you are in designing, and how is your creativity. I hope it will help. You can reach out to us for further queries.Thank You.

admission_process.title: The Global Open University Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: The Global Open University admissions are based on merit. The institute considers applications of candidates meeting the eligibility criteria.The Global Open Universityoffers courses at UG, PG and Advanced Masters levels. Some of the courses include B.Lib.I.Sc., BHMTT, MSW and M.Lib.I.Sc. Candidates can apply online for the preferred course.
The total tuition fees for UG courses isINR 12,150 - 38,550. Aspirants may also need to pay one-time caution deposit at the time of admission.
The institute offers UG courses for 1 year - 3 years. PG courses are offered for 1 year - 2 years.

faqs.question: Can I start a law practice without a Law degree or become a lawyer?
faqs.answer: No, you cannot become a lawyer without a Law degree.You mandatorily need to obtain degrees such as BA/BCom/BSc/BBA LLB or LLB in order to be a lawyer in India. To become a lawyer, one must first complete three-year or five-year LLB from a recognised university and possess degree certificate. Then, they must enrol themselves in local Bar Council of the concerned state and enrolled as an advocate. Within two years of the enrolment, they must appear and clear AIBE in order to be eligible to practise anywhere in India.

faqs.question: What is the scope after qualifying UGC NET?
faqs.answer: This is for the candidates who want to do PhD research or become Assistant professor. However, other career options can be PSUs jobs as well.The candidates who do not want to join any PSU can take up other options like online tutor, open their own coaching centres, guest faculty, consultant, Lab Trainer, IP lead, Author, Editor, Executive, Program Executive, etc.For conclusion we can say that the candidates qualifying for the UGC NET exam can take up any job they want or start their ow business after clearing one of the most the toughest exams in India.

highlights.summary:
The NEET UG 2026 registration window is now closed for admission to the MBBS, BDS, and other courses. The exam is scheduled for May 3, 2026.

A few more updates are given below:

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: The worst college dissatisfy.

review_content.Placements: Around 60% of students are placed. The average salary package offered ranges from 4 LPA to 20 LPA. Recruiting companies are Cipla, Makind, Abbott, etc. Around 60% of students get placed by Abbott, Mankind, and Cipla. Other students do not get placements because they get frustrated with this college. Because the college does not give the hope and experience that students want, they do not motivate them and they treat them only for fees.
review_content.Infrastructure: Good facilities are there along with lab and infrastructure. But library is very cheap and third class. There are no seats and books in it. Also mess food is very dirty. Bed of hostel is not clean and bathroom is very dirty. The hostel boys are in trouble many times with this college. Because the college does not order the hostel guard to take specific care of cleaning and mess food. Hostel is connected to the college.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc. in Computer Science - Batch of 2019
reviews_list.review_title: SSUTMS, Bhopal Review by Prajwal Pawar.

review_content.Placements: I completed my graduation in B.Sc. CS from this college in the year 2019. Talking about the placements of this college, no one from my batch got placed as this college didn't offer placements for B.Sc. or B.Com graduates. However, if you are doing B.E. or B.Tech from this college, you can get some decent placements. The highest package offered by companies was 11 LPA, and the average package was 2.5 LPA. Some of the companies that come here for recruiting are TCS, Infosys, Tech Mahindra, etc. No internship was offered to us by the college.

review_summary.college_name: Sri Satya Sai University of Technology and Medical Sciences (SSSUTMS) Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Pharmacy (D.Pharma.) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Good placement in 2024.

content.Placements: 80% of students were placed in my course. The highest package was 5 LPA, the lowest was 1 LPA, and the average was 2.5 LPA. Companies like Cipla, Mankind, etc. Many companies gave placements to students from lower college students, and the highest placement was given to M Pharmacy students.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities and infrastructure available were good management. Classrooms were very good, and the library was amazing, having all the course books available. There were no sports or games in the lower college. The mess and canteen had outstanding quality food, etc.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Aeronautical Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: The faculty is great, but students are not as much as the campus provides.

content.Placements: There is no such news of placement in SSSUTMS. During my 2 years of college, I haven't heard about any placement in my Aeronautical department. Otherwise, there might be placements that might have happened in the computer science department. Once, there was a notice issue about an industrial visit, but it never happened.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure at SSSUTMS is average. Students do not have university emails, nor is Wi-Fi provided for them. Wi-Fi is only available for staff. There is Wi-Fi by Jio, but it has limited data. The computer labs on campus are sufficient for teaching and are in an okay state. The library has all the books required in the curriculum, and you can also find extra reference books. The hostel is somewhat poor. I do not stay in the hostel, but my friends say the food is not good.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: The worst college dissatisfy.

content.Placements: Around 60% of students are placed. The average salary package offered ranges from 4 LPA to 20 LPA. Recruiting companies are Cipla, Makind, Abbott, etc. Around 60% of students get placed by Abbott, Mankind, and Cipla. Other students do not get placements because they get frustrated with this college. Because the college does not give the hope and experience that students want, they do not motivate them and they treat them only for fees.
content.Infrastructure: Good facilities are there along with lab and infrastructure. But library is very cheap and third class. There are no seats and books in it. Also mess food is very dirty. Bed of hostel is not clean and bathroom is very dirty. The hostel boys are in trouble many times with this college. Because the college does not order the hostel guard to take specific care of cleaning and mess food. Hostel is connected to the college.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Computer Science - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: SSUTMS, Bhopal Review by Prajwal Pawar.

content.Placements: I completed my graduation in B.Sc. CS from this college in the year 2019. Talking about the placements of this college, no one from my batch got placed as this college didn't offer placements for B.Sc. or B.Com graduates. However, if you are doing B.E. or B.Tech from this college, you can get some decent placements. The highest package offered by companies was 11 LPA, and the average package was 2.5 LPA. Some of the companies that come here for recruiting are TCS, Infosys, Tech Mahindra, etc. No internship was offered to us by the college.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely dissatisfied.

content.Placements: Our college has no placements; not a single company visited. According to previous records, the staff says the average package was 10 LPA, but there was not a single placement in my session.
content.Infrastructure: Our college has good infrastructure and a green environment. I cannot say much about the hostel because I did not live there. Canteen food was good, but there is no playground for sports activities.
content.Faculty: Teachers are helpful. They have a very old course curriculum, and the university does not update it. The passing percentage is good, but I do not know how students pass because the teachers are not interested in teaching.

faqs.question: Can I become a lawyer after completing my LLB?
faqs.answer: No, After completing LLB you become a lawyer, however, you are still not an advocate and hence cannot practice law.To become an advocate and to practice law as a profession, you mandatorily need to clear theAll India Bar Examination (AIBE). After qualifying AIBE, one can practice law as a full fledged profession.

faqs.question: Can I start a law practice without a Law degree or become a lawyer?
faqs.answer: No, you cannot become a lawyer without a Law degree.You mandatorily need to obtain degrees such as BA/BCom/BSc/BBA LLB or LLB in order to be a lawyer in India. To become a lawyer, one must first complete three-year or five-year LLB from a recognised university and possess degree certificate. Then, they must enrol themselves in local Bar Council of the concerned state and enrolled as an advocate. Within two years of the enrolment, they must appear and clear AIBE in order to be eligible to practise anywhere in India.

faqs.question: What entrance exams are accepted by SSSUTMS for admission to B.A.M.S.?
faqs.answer: The main entrance exam accepted is the *NEET*, which stands for National Eligibility cum Entrance Test for the admission to the B.A.M.S. programme in SSSUTMS. It is a common entrance conducted by National Testing Agency across India for B.A.M.S. programs in the private and government institutions in the country.A qualifying score in NEET is required for admission since it is a statutory requirement for medical and allied health Science courses. Then, the admission is based on counseling and cutoffs as per the NEET score and availability of seats.

reviews.review_heading: Good placement in 2024.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure available were good management. Classrooms were very good, and the library was amazing, having all the course books available. There were no sports or games in the lower college. The mess and canteen had outstanding quality food, etc.

reviews.review_heading: The faculty is great, but students are not as much as the campus provides.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure at SSSUTMS is average. Students do not have university emails, nor is Wi-Fi provided for them. Wi-Fi is only available for staff. There is Wi-Fi by Jio, but it has limited data. The computer labs on campus are sufficient for teaching and are in an okay state. The library has all the books required in the curriculum, and you can also find extra reference books. The hostel is somewhat poor. I do not stay in the hostel, but my friends say the food is not good.

reviews.review_heading: The worst college dissatisfy.
reviews.review_text: Good facilities are there along with lab and infrastructure. But library is very cheap and third class. There are no seats and books in it. Also mess food is very dirty. Bed of hostel is not clean and bathroom is very dirty. The hostel boys are in trouble many times with this college. Because the college does not order the hostel guard to take specific care of cleaning and mess food. Hostel is connected to the college.

reviews.review_heading: SSUTMS, Bhopal Review by Prajwal Pawar.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our department was decent; it was vast and the environment was also quite decent. There were all kinds of labs like the computer lab, chemistry lab, and others. Talking about the hostel facility, it was also decent, and the quality of food was acceptable. There were separate girls' and boys' hostels in this college, and the fee was around 12,000 for a year.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely dissatisfied.
reviews.review_text: Our college has good infrastructure and a green environment. I cannot say much about the hostel because I did not live there. Canteen food was good, but there is no playground for sports activities.

reviews.review_heading: Great campus and studies.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure and facilities are good and the hostel is great. We had to go to the labs and library every day which was a good experience. The hostel was very comfortable and all the students had a great time. The sports days were especially memorable.

reviews.review_heading: This is the best college in Madhya Pradesh.
reviews.review_text: The course was very good. Facilities and infrastructure were good in the pharmacy department. Wi-Fi facility was available. Classrooms were the best and a useful library was available. Canteen food was very good.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Sri Satya Sai University of Technology and Medical Sciences.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of this college plays a vital role in the development as the students were now focusing on the laboratories, classrooms, etc., while selecting a college. Computing resources were one of the important and mandatory needs of this college.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has a very good infrastructure, staff, teachers, canteen and playground.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good. They also provide good quality facilities like Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, library, hostels, mess, canteen, medical, and playground. Our college also organises many sports events, quiz types competitions and many entertaining occasions.

reviews.review_heading: There are good faculty members in this college.
reviews.review_text: Both boys and girls hostels are available in our college. Our college also has public Wi-Fi facility and all subjects labs. A hospital is available for medical facilities, and games and sports are organised here. Apart from this, many faculty members from outside the college visit our college for expert lectures.

reviews.review_heading: Stay away unless you don't love your career.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is of top-class undoubtedly. But there is no benefit of having a good infrastructure if college is not offering quality education. There are good labs and classrooms, but they are of no use if they are not providing quality education. Stay away from this college.

reviews.review_heading: Never choose for engineering.
reviews.review_text: There are several buildings, and there is a space for games like football and cricket. They have huge infrastructure and a lot of open spaces for playground and canteen. It's close to Pachama railway station and further connected to Sehore-Bhopal road. The infrastructure is in good condition, and it has an awesome location, and it is a cool place.

reviews.review_heading: Good management and also pharmacy departments are good.
reviews.review_text: Good in infrastructure but amenities cleanliness are not up to date. Higher tier grasses are grown in the garden areas. Water is not available in the summer due to this classes of hostel student are mostly absent. The college management is not working for the student but working for their self.

reviews.review_heading: An infrastructure oriented college with generous faculty.
reviews.review_text: This college is only concentrating on its infrastructure, but not on the environment-friendly infrastructure. It just contains the buildings. They do not have a good canteen although remaining things are nice and infrastructure is also fine.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Sri Satya Sai University of Technology and Medical Sciences (SSSUTMS).
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is world-class. Classrooms would be empty after 1st semester due to the unavailability of faculty members. The hostel facility is available. Medical facilities are available. Sports and games are not applicable, and you would not get any help here if you like sports. Labs are not available.

reviews_list.review_title: It is a decent college with a strong faculty members.

review_content.Placements: Generally, there are no placements in the B.Arch course. We have to do an internship in the 4th year, which is part of our course, but quite a few students end up to do a job in the same firm. All roles are offered from planning to presentations. The average salary offered is about Rs.15,000 to 17,000 per month.
review_content.Infrastructure: The intake in our college is more than 160 students, which is high compared to any other college in the architecture in Mumbai. There are enough classrooms for such a large intake. There is a computer lab, library, a combination of auditorium and classroom, etc. The food served in the canteen is decent.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Architecture (B.Arch.) - Batch of 2018
reviews_list.review_title: It's a good college in terms of curriculum and academics.

review_content.Placements: The college does not provide us internships. It is up to the students to decide and search for a suitable job. They do not provide us with placements after completion of the degree. You have to choose wisely.
review_content.Infrastructure: Dr. Baliram Hiray College of architecture has a basic infrastructure. There is Wi-Fi and CC cameras are present in each classroom. It has old furniture and the canteen is not up to the mark. The toilets are clean and hygienic, but the campus lacks area for outdoor activities and there is no parking facility available. There is a stationary in the campus shop.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Architecture (B.Arch.) - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: Absolutely satisfied. Keeping in mind about the teaching and extra curricular activities of the colg

review_content.Placements: Placements are on basis of marks and design folios. Usual placements are in Mumbai, Bangalore and Pune. Packages are around 10-12k for internships and after degree it is around 25k for junior architect at any firm. Out of a batch of 180, around 100-120 were placed.
review_content.Infrastructure: There are 20 hostel rooms in college only for male and the fees is rs.1500/- per month. There are no rooms for girls in hostel. There are three PG's in the proximity of college and they are quite good to stay and the cost is around rs.2000/- to rs.2500/-. Food is quite good in college and the cost of per meal is approximately. Rs.45/-. Quality of classrooms, labs, library is good. Wi-Fi is pathetic and infrastructure needs a lot of upgradation.

review_summary.college_name: Hiray Group of Institutes Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Architecture (B.Arch.) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: I am totally satisfied with this college because of its good faculty members and placements.

content.Placements: I am from the bachelor of architecture course. Almost 90% of the students got placed. The highest salary offered could be up to Rs. 1 lac per month, the lowest salary offered is Rs. 15,000 per month, and the average salary offered is Rs. 25,000 per month. Almost 90% of the students got internships from our college. Roles offered in our course are an architect and interior designer.
content.Infrastructure: Our college is under renovation, but the infrastructure is good. We have Wi-Fi, computer labs, good classrooms and a library. We have a canteen and a gymkhana in our college, but our college doesn't have any hostel. We have many sports activities in our college like cricket and football, and we have teams for it. Food in our canteen is best with special Chinese and south Indian food.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Architecture (B.Arch.) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: It is the best college with affordable fees for architecture students.

content.Placements: Generally, there are no placements in our field, but we get a chance to do an internship in our 4th year. In internships, students can create a good impact on their profiles in front of the architect under whom they are doing internships. Students can also search for jobs in the government field once they complete their graduation.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities provided in our college are good. The library is open from 9 am to 5 pm. Studios in our college are very well designed and maintained. The food served in the canteen is fine, and the hostel facilities are satisfactory. Sports are organised during the fest in January.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Architecture (B.Arch.) - Batch of 2018
individual_reviews.title: It is a decent college with a strong faculty members.

content.Placements: Generally, there are no placements in the B.Arch course. We have to do an internship in the 4th year, which is part of our course, but quite a few students end up to do a job in the same firm. All roles are offered from planning to presentations. The average salary offered is about Rs.15,000 to 17,000 per month.
content.Infrastructure: The intake in our college is more than 160 students, which is high compared to any other college in the architecture in Mumbai. There are enough classrooms for such a large intake. There is a computer lab, library, a combination of auditorium and classroom, etc. The food served in the canteen is decent.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Architecture (B.Arch.) - Batch of 2018
individual_reviews.title: It's a good college in terms of curriculum and academics.

content.Placements: The college does not provide us internships. It is up to the students to decide and search for a suitable job. They do not provide us with placements after completion of the degree. You have to choose wisely.
content.Infrastructure: Dr. Baliram Hiray College of architecture has a basic infrastructure. There is Wi-Fi and CC cameras are present in each classroom. It has old furniture and the canteen is not up to the mark. The toilets are clean and hygienic, but the campus lacks area for outdoor activities and there is no parking facility available. There is a stationary in the campus shop.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Architecture (B.Arch.) - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely satisfied. Keeping in mind about the teaching and extra curricular activities of the colg

content.Placements: Placements are on basis of marks and design folios. Usual placements are in Mumbai, Bangalore and Pune. Packages are around 10-12k for internships and after degree it is around 25k for junior architect at any firm. Out of a batch of 180, around 100-120 were placed.
content.Infrastructure: There are 20 hostel rooms in college only for male and the fees is rs.1500/- per month. There are no rooms for girls in hostel. There are three PG's in the proximity of college and they are quite good to stay and the cost is around rs.2000/- to rs.2500/-. Food is quite good in college and the cost of per meal is approximately. Rs.45/-. Quality of classrooms, labs, library is good. Wi-Fi is pathetic and infrastructure needs a lot of upgradation.

highlights.summary: Get all the latest information regarding Parvathyâ€™s Arts and Science College Courses, Fees, Eligibility, Admission, Rankings and Reviews on this page.

placements.overview: Parvathy's Arts and Science College was founded in 2005. It is a private institute and is located in Dindigul, Tamil Nadu. Parvathy's Arts and Science College courses are offered to students at the UG, PG and Advanced Masters levels. The institute offers courses in Full Time mode. Parvathy's Arts and Science College offers a total of 31 courses in streams such as Business & Management Studies, IT & Software, Accounting & Commerce, Design, Mass Communication & Media and Humanities & Social Sciences. Some of the popular courses offered at the institute are B.Sc., M.Sc., BCA, B.Com and B.A. and the total seat intake for the available courses is 80. These courses are offered to students across several specialisations such as Chemistry, Computer Science, Data Analytics, English and Fashion Design. Further, the average median salary is around INR 1,36,923. Apart from this, the Parvathy's Arts and Science College campus has a state-of-the-art infrastructure with all the advanced facilities.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc. in Computer Science - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: The college is totally not worth joining, and does not have placements. Choose the college wisely.

review_content.Placements: None of them got placed in a good IT company. The college invites manufacturing companies to all departments, but we are from a technical background. The maximum salary package offered is 2 LPA only. Entirely manufacturing companies like Foxconn, etc., offer placements. No one got internships here. I don't think they offer any top roles.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is okay because they have only 3 blocks. I think that's not enough. It does not have any Wi-Fi facility. There are a lot of systems in the lab, but none of them work properly. Some systems may not work, and some systems don't have a keyboard or mouse. Only a few systems work properly. There are many students in one class, and how will students work in the lab and complete the coding tasks when the systems are not sufficient? The library is pretty good. I don't know much about the hostel. The canteen doesn't have much food and snack items, which is the worst.

There will be a special training program for students lagging behind.

admission_overview.college_name: DES Pune University Course Admissions 2025: Fees, Eligibility, Dates & Selection Process

paragraphs: DES Pune University admissionsare based on scores of various state/ national-level entrance exams. The selection criteria is a mix of entrance exams and merit-based as per respective courses. DES Pune University admissions begin with an online application process. Candidates can either qualify for the university entrance exam or other exams such asJEE Main, MHT CET, CAT, XAT, etc., to proceed with other selection rounds conducted atDES Pune University. To get admitted to DES Pune University, candidates must meet the eligibility criteria set by the university. Apart from the UG and PG courses, the university also offers PhD programme. The application process atDES Pune Universityis conducted online. Read the article to know more aboutDES Pune Universitycourse admission2025.

DES Pune University course admissionis a mix of entrance or merit-based. Students seeking to apply for any of the courses offered at the university must fulfil the admission criteria of the desired programme before applying for it. Applicants need to register and appear for the accepted entrance exam before applying for the course. Students can refer to the table below to know about the eligibility and selection criteria for popularDES Pune University courses:
Class 12 with a 45% aggregate (40% aggregate in case of candidates belonging to reserved category) withPhysics, Mathematics and Chemistry
Graduation with a 50% aggregate
CAT/MAT/XAT/SNAP/NMAT/ GMAT/ PERA/CMAT/MAH-CET/ATMA/MAT/ DES PU Entrance Exam

DES Pune University admissions are entirely based on scores of several entrance exams. The steps of admission comprise multiple rounds. Check below the detailed steps for DES Pune University admission process:
Step 1: Application Process

DES Pune University application process is conducted in an online mode. To apply for UG and PG courses at the university, candidates must visit the official website (https://despu.edu.in) and apply for their desired programme. They must also pay an application fee of INR 1,080.
Step 2: Selection Rounds

DES Pune University admission is entrance-based for all of its UG and PG courses. Candidates must fulfil the basic eligibility requirements of the programme they are applying for. Moreover, the university conducts its in-house entrance exam to grant admission to all courses. However, various state/ national-level entrance exams are also accepted for courses such as BTech, MTech, MBA, etc. After getting shortlisted based on the entrance exam scores, candidates must pay the course fee.
Step 4: Final Admission

The university also releases a merit list based on the composite score of the candidates for admission. Shortlisted aspirants need to come for document verification and pay theDES Pune University feeto confirm their seats at the university.

faqs.answer: To enroll in a MBA course at DES Pune University, candidates must meet the eligibility criteria set by the university. The institute offers full-time MBA courses lasting two years. Students are selected based on CAT/MAT/XAT/ SNAP/NMAT/ GMAT/ PERA/ CMAT/ MAH-CET/ ATMA/MAT/ DES PU Entrance Exam + PI. In addition to the selection criteria, students must pass Class graduation (common eligibility).

faqs.question: What is the eligibility for MBA admission at DES Pune University?
faqs.answer: For admission in a MBA programme at DES Pune University, it is crucial that the aspirant fulfills the course-specific eligibility criteria. Thus, only the aspirants who have passed graduation with a 50% aggregate are eligible for admission. In addition, student should have passed the qualifying examination from a recognised board. Candidate must also hold the graduation mark sheet during application form filling and at the time of admission for verification purposes.

MBA graduates can expect to make between INR 5 LPA and INR 25 LPA in income.

faqs.answer: Admission to MBA course is based on entrance. The university admits students based on CAT/MAT/XAT/ SNAP/NMAT/ GMAT/ PERA/ CMAT/ MAH-CET/ ATMA/MAT/ DES PU Entrance Exam + PI. On graduating with MBA courses, candidates may choose to pursue careers inSales Managers, Finance Managers, Marketing Managers, Human Resources Managers,Product Manager, etc., human resources. MBA graduates can expect to make between INR 5 LPA and INR 25 LPA in income.

faqs.question: Is the DES Pune University cutoff released?
faqs.answer: The cutoff for DES Pune University hasn't been declared yet. However, I can help you know about the admission process by DES Pune University. For different courses, DES Pune University has its own entrance exam known as DES UCET/PCET . The exam will carry 25 general aptitude questions and 25 program-specific questions. There will be no penalty for an incorrect answer. Online personal interaction will also carry 50 marks ¹. Most cases accept standardized entrance test scores for programs like B.T

faqs.answer: No, direct admissions are not valid at DES Pune University. Admission to all the UG and PG courses at the university is completely based on the scores of state/ national-level entrance exams/DES PU entrance. Candidates need to qualify for the entrance exams with a valid score and submit their rank or scorecard at the time of admission

faqs.question: How to get a seat for admission at DES Pune University?
faqs.answer: To secure a seat at DES Pune University, students can check the following steps presented below:Visit the official website and complete the online application process.Candidates can also apply offline for courses via offline application form.The selection criteria is merit or entrance-based.Upon selected, pay the specified fee to confirm and secure your seat.

faqs.question: How do I get admission to DES Pune University?

faqs.question: Which entrance exam is accepted by DES Pune University?
faqs.answer: DES Pune University accepts various entrance exams conducted at state/ national-level. However, candidates can also appear for the university's in-house entrance exam, i.e., DES PU PCET. This exam is valid for most of the UG and PG courses, including MBA, BBA, BSc, etc. Further, the commonly accepted entrance exams by DES Pune University are:CAT, MAT, XAT, MHT CET, JEE Main, PERA CET, GATE and more.

college_info.college_name: DES Pune University Scholarship Details

paragraphs: Yes, DES Pune University offers scholarship to deserving and meritorious students. DES Pune University offers scholarships to deserving and meritorious students. The scholarships are based on academic performance, financial need, and other criteria. For DES alumni applying to any programme, the university offers a 10% scholarship on first-year tuition fees.

DES University offers BSc course for a duration of three years. The total fee of the prorgamme is inclusive of multiple components. Candidates need to pay a certain amount of fee to confirm their seat at the time of admission. The total fee of BSc programme range between INR 1.8 Lacs - INR 3.6 lakh. Candidates are advised to visit the official website for a detailed fee structure.

DES Pune University offers many scholarships to undergraduate (UG) students based on merit and need. Students in BA degrees, for example, may get scholarships of up to INR 25,000, but students enrolled in B.Des programs in disciplines such as Interior Design and User Experience may be eligible for a grant of up to INR 50,000. The institution seeks to make education accessible by providing financial help targeted to individual programs and students' academic achievements, as well as some supplementary assistance for students in financially constrained conditions

Candidates filling the application form for any of the UG/ PG courses at DES Pune University must pay an application fee at the time of admission. The application fee is a non refundable amount of INR 1,080, which can be paid through Net Banking/ Card/ G-Pay etc.
